states.name: Nanami
states.title: Fleetfoot Samurai
states.description:
Lightning Hare Nanami, Shinano Academy graduate and interim professor of combat. Vessel of the Goddess's Speed. 

That's how the other students know her, at least. To tell the truth, it weirds her out to think of herself as a professor. She'd always been a wild kid, right from the day they brought her to the school, and she can't say teaching high school girls how to beat each other up was her lifelong dream. But it hasn't been working out too badly...so far, at least. 

Everyone in the school knows her gift. With sword strikes so swift they're barely visible, there was never any hiding it. Some would say that puts her at a disadvantage. Nanami says anyone who wants to take her on is more than welcome to try.

states.name: Nanami
states.title: Fleetfoot Samurai
states.description: Most of Nanami's students think her ears gave her away as a Vessel. And they're not totally wrong: a little girl with bunny ears will naturally draw more Church attention than her normal classmates. But even non-Vessels can gain an animal's ears or tail, if the Goddess chooses to bless them with it. No. Five-year-old Nanami saw a car hurtling towards a puppy in the road and dove out to save it. In a matter of seconds, she had not only reached the puppy and picked it up; she'd shot across the street, clear into the next neighborhood, too panicked to stop running. They found her downtown a day later, still holding the puppy. That was when the Church knew she was truly special.
